what_it_does: Records the paused status of a WIDEN/DEBATE pre-build orchestration for a universal-projection build, notes the durable artifact produced so far, and lays out the authorized plan and five lenses to re-run after a session limit resets.
observations: Status is PAUSED as of 2026-06-19 because the widen orchestration hit a session/usage limit.
No findings were produced; the five widen agents only returned the limit notice.
The durable artifact so far is UNIFICATION-MAP.md at commit 0c62ac6, a v1 unified theorem with every seam marked.
Tim approved the direction and authorized WIDEN + STRETCH + DEBATE before any build.
The planned sequence is WIDEN → DEBATE seams → STRETCH into map v2 → loop-prep → build, with quality over speed.
Conventional grounding is treated as offerings, not impositions, per Tim's reject-frameworks rule.
Five lenses are defined: geometry/equation/formal math; four root axes/structure; invariant law; instrument/cube; whole/meta.
Next action is to re-run the five WIDEN lenses after the reset so they can synthesize full findings.
After re-run, the author will synthesize map v2, shape and run a DEBATE, stretch to a final pre-build map, then loop-prep.
standouts: The orchestration was explicitly halted by an external session/usage limit, making this a continuity checkpoint.
A five-lens WIDEN method is used as a structured pre-build gate before any implementation.
The cube is positioned as both a new archetype on the live engine and a 3-D fork (true 3D vs 2D projection from vantage).
Conventional frameworks are explicitly framed as offerings rather than impositions.
conventions: Uses a dated status header and references a durable artifact with a commit hash.
Organizes work into numbered lenses with explicit push/stretch goals.
Labels seams as S1–S4 and ties them to specific conceptual tensions.
States a single named approver (Tim) and a quality-over-speed rule.
Ends with a clear NEXT ACTION and downstream sequence.
concerns: The file is entirely forward-looking; no actual findings or synthesized results are present.
It depends on many unread formal-math references that have not yet been processed.
The pause was caused by an external usage limit, not a deliberate milestone.
Scope is large and hinges on one person's judgment, which could bottleneck progress.
Numerous internal project terms are referenced without definition in this file.
notes: This file is a continuity memo for a halted multi-lens conceptual prep phase, preserving state, durable artifacts, and the authorized next-step plan until work can resume.
questions: What is the exact content of UNIFICATION-MAP.md v1?
Who or what are the five widen agents, and how do they operate?
What do the seven verbs and the six states of unity refer to?
What is the current implementation status of the 3-D fork and live engine archetypes?
What specifically does Tim's reject-frameworks rule prohibit or allow?
purpose_vs_actual: It says it is a resume note for a paused WIDEN/DEBATE phase, and that is exactly what it does: it records status, durable output, and next actions.
apparent_themes: Axis, scale, invariant, and geometric law unification
intention_signals: It is trying to preserve momentum and context after an interruption, align the next cycle of deep reading and synthesis across five conceptual lenses, and keep the build gated until the prep is judged real.
novelty: A structured five-lens WIDEN/DEBATE/STRETCH pre-build gate, checkpointed by an explicit session-limit pause, with conventional frameworks explicitly treated as offerings rather than impositions.
contribution: It contributes a paused-state checkpoint, a pointer to the durable v1 map and its commit, an authorized multi-lens prep plan, and a set of seam labels and lens scopes that a resumed or fused process can continue without re-deriving context.
summary_for_embedding: A markdown resume note recording that a five-lens WIDEN/DEBATE pre-build orchestration for a universal-projection build was paused by a session limit with no findings yet, and outlining the planned re-run, synthesis, debate, stretch, and loop-prep next steps.
intention_for_embedding: To preserve the state and next-action plan of a conceptual pre-build widening/debate orchestration until the session limit resets.
